steps: Go to https://buttondown.com and log in (or create a free account)
Scroll down to the 'API' section at the bottom of the settings page
Your API key is displayed there — click to copy it

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: API Key
credential_fields.description: Your Buttondown API key, sent in the Authorization header as 'Token <api_key>'

notes: The API key is a UUID and is persistent — it does not expire
API key is passed using 'Token' prefix in the Authorization header (not 'Bearer')
One API key per account; regenerating it invalidates the old one
API base URL uses versioning: https://api.buttondown.email/v1/

test_endpoint.description: Returns a paginated list of your newsletter subscribers
